mapper.select: SELECT ccocr.*, oc.oil_card_no FROM t_car_cost_oil_card_receive ccocr LEFT JOIN t_oil_card oc ON ccocr.oil_card_id = oc.oil_card_id WHERE waybill_id = #{waybillId} ORDER BY ccocr.create_time DESC

SELECT ccocr.*, w.waybill_number, w.container_number, w.route_name, w.business_date, w.load_time, v.vehicle_number, s.short_name, o.order_no, oc.oil_card_no FROM t_car_cost_oil_card_receive ccocr LEFT JOIN t_waybill w ON ccocr.waybill_id = w.waybill_id LEFT JOIN t_vehicle v ON w.vehicle_id = v.vehicle_id LEFT JOIN t_shipper s ON w.shipper_id = s.shipper_id LEFT JOIN t_order o ON w.order_id = o.order_id LEFT JOIN t_oil_card oc ON ccocr.oil_card_id = oc.oil_card_id WHERE ccocr.oil_card_receive_id = #{moduleId}

SELECT * FROM t_car_cost_oil_card_receive WHERE audit_status = #{auditStatus} AND waybill_id IN
#{item}
